name: mural-skills-pack
description: Five Mural skills: muralize (conversation -> infographic + board-spec), mural-image-rebuilder (image -> reconstructed Mural board), mural-local-driver (drive an open Mural board 100% locally through the browser, no API/MCP), mural-retro-recycler (duplicate a retro/workshop board and empty it for the next cycle), and mural-done-signal (a shared 'who's finished' readiness tracker that survives private mode).
